nodes.label: icon-512.png
nodes.description: 512×512 PWA/app icon: three nested centered squares (black outer, orange middle, white inner), sharp corners, no gradients or shadows.

nodes.label: Nested-square brand mark
nodes.description: Minimal geometric brand mark: square-within-square composition, symmetrical and centered.

nodes.label: Black outer field
nodes.description: Solid black outermost square serving as icon background/border.

nodes.label: Orange brand square
nodes.description: Large solid high-saturation orange middle square; primary brand accent (approx #FF7F00, aligns with app orange #FF6B00).

nodes.label: White inner square
nodes.description: Smaller solid white (#FFFFFF) center square nested inside the orange field.

nodes.label: PWA install / home-screen icon
nodes.description: High-resolution app icon for Web App Manifest / installable PWA under public/icons for the calc road-marking payroll app.
